subject: Incorrect location on property page
description: The pin location on map is showing wrong address. It should be near Worli seaface, not the current location.

subject: Fake listing - property doesn't exist
description: This property is listed but doesn't exist at the mentioned address. I visited the location and found a different building.
resolutionNotes: Property suspended due to complaint: test1
actionTaken: Property Modern 4BHK Independent Villa has been suspended

subject: Images don't match actual property
description: The photos shown in listing are from a different property. The actual property is in poor condition and not as described.
actionTaken: Complaint rejected - user asked to submit more proof

subject: Property already sold but still listed
description: This property was sold 2 months ago but still shows as available. Please remove or mark as sold.
resolutionNotes: Property marked as sold and delisted

subject: Duplicate listing - same property posted multiple times
description: Same property is listed 3 times with different prices. This is confusing and seems like spam.

subject: Harassment by agent after visit
description: Agent has been continuously calling and messaging after we decided not to buy. This is harassment.
actionTaken: Agent warned, user advised to block number

subject: Hidden charges not mentioned in listing
description: Listing mentioned price 1.2 Cr but after negotiation, additional charges like GST, maintenance, parking extra are adding 20L more.
